content: Yiqiao Yin (pronounced 'E-ciao Yin' — the letter E in front of the Italian Ciao) is a Principal AI Engineer at FICO, a global data analytics company providing credit scoring solutions. Previously: Tech Lead at Vertex Inc (tax technologies), Senior ML Engineer at LabCorp (S&P 500, drug diagnostics and AI-driven solutions), Data Scientist at Bayer (EURO STOXX 50, agriculture), Quantitative Researcher (apprenticeship) at AQR (alternative quantitative strategies hedge fund), and Equity Trader at T3 Trading on Wall Street (licensed Series 56 by FINRA). He has been in AI/ML since 2015 and data science since 2014, working on Computer Vision, NLP, LLMs, and Generative AI. He supervises a small fund specializing in algorithmic trading since 2011. He runs a monetized YouTube channel and is active on LinkedIn. PhD student in Statistics at Columbia University (2020-2021), BA in Mathematics and MS in Finance from University of Rochester. Research interests: representation learning, feature learning, deep learning, computer vision, NLP, financial economics, and asset pricing.
